provenance.contract: virtual electrode spacing = real SEEG spacing (user-locked). Spacing is BIMODAL: depth ~4mm vs grid/strip ~10mm. Do NOT collapse to a single average; pick the band matching the simulated electrode type.
provenance.method: per shaft: sort contacts by integer contact number, adjacent-contact Euclidean distance, per-shaft median. Cohort number = median-of-per-shaft-medians per band.

classification_bands_mm.other: outside both bands -> flagged ambiguous, not force-fit

yuquan.modality: all-depth (unimodal) — no grid/strip electrodes in cohort
yuquan.source: user-locked 3.5mm; recomputed per-shaft median 3.5011mm reproduces the v3.1-lock 3.501mm audited value (docs/archive/topic0/seeg_coord_loader/v3_1_lock_2026-05-21.md). Coords from chnXyzDict.npy (fs_native_ras_mm).

epilepsiae.modality: bimodal — depth-SEEG (~4.6mm) AND grid/strip (~11mm) both present

ambiguous.note: 5 shafts (~6.0-6.8mm) sit just above the depth band (wide-pitch depth); 1 shaft (115002 RHA ~16mm) just above the grid band (wide grid/strip). Edge cases between the two modes, flagged not force-fit. Cohort bimodality is unambiguous.

epilepsiae.source: audit_electrode_spacing.py over all_data_sqls (electrode table coord_x/y/z, MNI152 1mm voxels -> mm via MNI152_1MM_AFFINE through src.seeg_coord_loader)
